P1_flat_simplify_propvals_smt: tactic.default_tactic=(then (then (using-params simplify :elim_and false :blast_distinct false :local_ctx false :pull_cheap_ite false :som false :flat false :push_ite_arith false :hoist_ite false :arith_lhs false) propagate-values smt) fail-if-undecided)
P4_flat_simplify_smt_seed500: tactic.default_tactic=(then (then (using-params simplify :elim_and false :blast_distinct false :local_ctx false :pull_cheap_ite false :som false :flat false :push_ite_arith false :hoist_ite false :arith_lhs false) (using-params smt :random_seed 500)) fail-if-undecided)
P3_propineqs_flat_simplify_smt: tactic.default_tactic=(then (then propagate-ineqs (using-params simplify :elim_and false :blast_distinct false :local_ctx false :pull_cheap_ite false :som false :flat false :push_ite_arith false :hoist_ite false :arith_lhs false) smt) fail-if-undecided)
